cli.result_summary:
## Summary

All tasks complete. **17 client tests pass, CLI and server binaries build successfully.**

### What was built

| Package | Files | Tests |
|---------|-------|-------|
| `internal/client` | `client.go`, `client_test.go` | 17 tests |
| `cmd/cli` | `main.go` | ‚Äî (entrypoint) |

### Team assignments & results

- **Client Library Engineer** ‚Üí HTTP client with 10 API methods (`RegisterWorkflow`, `GetWorkflow`, `ListWorkflows`, `StartRun`, `GetRun`, `ListRuns`, `GetEvents`, `CancelRun`, `Stats`, `Health`), custom `APIError` type, and 17 httptest-based tests covering all methods + error scenarios (500, 404, plain text errors, malformed JSON)

- **CLI Commands Engineer** ‚Üí CLI entrypoint with 9 subcommands (`register`, `run`, `status`, `events`, `list`, `cancel`, `workflows`, `stats`, `help`), color-coded status output (green/yellow/red/blue/gray), `NO_COLOR` support, vertical event timeline, aligned table output, bar-chart stats display, `MINIFLOW_API` env var override

### Verification results
- `go mod tidy` ‚Äî clean
- `go test ./internal/client/... -v` ‚Äî 17/17 PASS
- `go build ./cmd/cli` ‚Äî success
- `go build ./cmd/server` ‚Äî success

engine.result_summary:
## Summary

All tasks complete. **39 tests pass, server binary builds successfully.**

### What was built

| Package | Files | Tests |
|---------|-------|-------|
| `internal/model` | `workflow.go`, `run.go`, `event.go` | ‚Äî (type definitions) |
| `internal/store` | `store.go`, `errors.go`, `store_test.go` | 13 tests |
| `internal/executor` | `executor.go`, `scheduler.go`, `executor_test.go` | 6 tests (11 sub-tests) |
| `internal/activity` | `registry.go`, `builtin.go`, `worker.go`, `worker_test.go` | 8 tests |
| `internal/handler` | `handler.go`, `types.go`, `handler_test.go` | 12 tests |
| `internal/config` | `config.go` | ‚Äî |
| `cmd/server` | `main.go` | ‚Äî (entrypoint) |

### Team assignments & results
- **Store & State Engineer** ‚Üí SQLite store with all CRUD operations, `ClaimNextActivity` with mutex-guarded transactions, and concurrency tests
- **Scheduler & Executor Engineer** ‚Üí Workflow executor with input expression resolution (`$.input`, `$.steps[N].output`), scheduler polling loop
- **Activity Runtime Engineer** ‚Üí Activity registry, 5 built-in handlers (noop, sleep, http-call, log, fail), worker pool with heartbeating and retry logic
- **Me (Workflow Engine Lead)** ‚Üí Model types, HTTP handlers with chi routing, config, server entrypoint with graceful shutdown

integration.result_summary:
## Summary

All tasks complete. **18 integration tests pass, 57 total tests across the project, both binaries build.**

### What was built

| File | Tests | Coverage |
|------|-------|----------|
| `tests/helpers_test.go` | ‚Äî (shared infra) | `newTestEnv`, `newTestEnvWithWorkers`, `registerTestWorkflow`, `waitForRunStatus`, `sampleWorkflow` |
| `tests/workflow_test.go` | 6 tests | Register/list, simple execution, data passing, multi-step, run input, filtered listing |
| `tests/failure_test.go` | 6 tests | Retry on failure, cancel running, cancel pending, event history, concurrent runs, 404 handling |
| `tests/client_test.go` | 6 tests | Client register, start+get, list, events, cancel, stats |

### Team assignments & results

- **Workflow Lifecycle Tester** ‚Üí helpers_test.go + workflow_test.go + client_test.go ‚Äî 12 tests covering full workflow lifecycle and client API surface
- **Failure & Edge Case Tester** ‚Üí failure_test.go ‚Äî 6 tests covering retry logic, cancellation, event timeline, concurrency, and error responses

### Key findings
- SQLite BUSY errors occur under concurrent worker contention but are handled gracefully (workers retry on next poll)
- The "fail" activity with `max_retries=2` confirms retry behavior ‚Äî `Attempts > 1` before marking failed
- All activity types (noop, sleep, log, fail) exercised across the test suite

### Verification results
- `go mod tidy` ‚Äî clean
- `go test ./...` ‚Äî 57/57 PASS
- `go build ./cmd/server` ‚Äî success
- `go build ./cmd/cli` ‚Äî success
